metadata.title:
CARRY THE RAILROAD


FIGHT TO BITTER END

Spokane Shippers Will Fight Hill in


Politics if Necessary---Rai|road
Officials Busy With Their Scissors.

pages.raw_text:
for the moment they withdrew their
business from the o. II, & n. they
would receive the odium OF all Spokane
businessmen.


Cutting Out the Interviews.


Nor are the railroads idle. They are
no longer ridiculing the agreement of
the Spokane shippers but are bending
every energy to break it. They are
placing businessmen of Spokane on
record with the officials Of the Hill
lines. Every comment made by the
newspapers anent the freight situa-
ton is being filed, and all interviews
with tho shippers are being carefully
cut out and sent to the head officials
at st. Paul.


What the motive Of this is is not as
yet determined, but it Is supposed
there Is some plan on foot for a retail
iation by the Northern Poetic and
Great Northern companies.
